d06_markdown:
### Multi-rate Tg analysis

| Rate | Tg_MD |
|------|-------|
| 25 K/ns | 434.0 K |
| 50 K/ns | 415.8 K |
| 100 K/ns | 501.2 K |

**Log-linear**: Tg = 260.7 + 48.47·ln(Γ)  R²=0.5580
→ Tg at 1.67e-10 K/ns (DSC-equivalent, 10 K/min) = **-830.7 K**  (theoretical DSC-equivalent experimental Tg)

**VF extrapolation** (Tg0 at Γ→0): Tg⁰ = 414.8 ± inf K (95% CI)  R²=0.9326  quality=POOR_POORLY_CONSTRAINED
⚠ CI > 100 K: VF extrapolation is underconstrained with < 2 decades of rates. Use log-linear result for validation.
tg_at_slow_rate_patch_reason: loglinear R2=0.558 (<0.90, 0.6-decade span) -> DSC extrap unreliable (-830.7 K nonsense); accept slowest-rate MD Tg per ps-pcff-tg-slopegate-fail memory + plan D-06b. VF tg0=414.8 K corroborates.
